meaning: n.确立,制定,设施,公司,军事组织
examples: The speaker announced the establishment of a new college.
It will result in the establishment of the world's largest marine reserve.
The hotel is a comfortable and well-run establishment.
Such acts led the political establishment to unfairly label Romero as a revolutionary and a radical.
And he feels that change requires "rigorous performance measurement", the establishment of "concrete targets".
